name: chessright
description: ChessRight — free, frontend-only chess website. Stockfish in the browser, P2P multiplayer, instant post-game analysis.

scripts.check: node --check web/scripts/landing.js web/scripts/ui.js web/scripts/account.js web/scripts/play/main.js web/scripts/play/board.js web/scripts/play/engine.js web/scripts/play/accuracy.js web/scripts/play/store.js web/scripts/play/net.js web/scripts/play/clock.js
